feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SCIM3 PATCH API returning 403 Forbidden in SAP Analytics Cloud (GET works, Admin access available)
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I am facing an issue while using the SCIM3 API in SAP Analytics Cloud to update team members using PATCH operation.

API Details

Endpoint:

PATCH  /api/v1/scim3/Groups/<TEAM_UUID>

Authentication:
  • Authorization Bearer Token
Headers Used

  • Authorization: Bearer <access_token>

  • x-csrf-token: <csrf_token>

  • x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true

Payload
"schemas": [
            "urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:PatchOp"
        ],
        "Operations": [
            {
                "op":"add",
                "path":"members",
                "value":[
                    {
                        "value":"d0bbac78-776890-9876hjmd",
                        "type":"User",
                        "display":"newuser",
                        "$ref":"/api/v1/scim3/Users/d0bbac78-776890-9876hjmd"
                    }
                ]
            },
            {
                "op": "replace",
            "path": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group:description",
            "value": "patch test"
            }
        ]
Issue

The PATCH request consistently returns:

{
"status": 403,
"error":"Forbidden"
}

Observations

  • GET operations on /api/v1/scim3/Groups are working successfully.
  • Team UUID is retrieved correctly.
  • Team type is userGroup.
  • I have full admin access (BI_Admin role) in SAP Analytics Cloud.
  • OAuth Client is configured with API access with App Integration.
  • CSRF Token is fetched and passed correctly.
  • when CSRF token is removed, the API returns 401 Unauthorized.
  • PATCH always returns 403 Forbidden.
Questions
  1. Are there additional permissions required specifically for SCIM3 PATCH operations ?
  2. Does the OAuth client require explicit SCIM provisioning(write) permissions?
  3. Are there any tenant-level restrictions for SCIM3 write operations ?
Attachments
  • PATCH request (headers + payload)

 

  • Response (403 Forbidden)

Any guidance would be helpful

Thanks!

entry.title: the Date Hierarchy SAC , in some story the filter can only be sorted with default direction
entry.content:
the Date Hierarchy does not work well in SAC , in some story the filter can only be sorted with default direction , in other story the visuals only works with flat presentation.

see in screenshots. the same filter, change from default to lastest first. the filter does not show any values anymore .

entry.title: Missing CSS Class field for components in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Has the CSS Class field been removed?

I am trying to apply box shadows under my panels with the SPA_SAMPLE_CONTENT_Theme.

 

If I copy the panel from another Page, the Class is clearly copied along with it, but there is no field where it can be edited.

 

 

I found a video from just a month ago that has the field for the Class name:

entry.title: User not able to share bookmarks in sac stories
entry.content: Users are unable to find other users in the user list when attempting to share a personal bookmark with other SAC users who have same role. The data model resides in Datasphere, where the user has a "consume" role. Furthermore, in SAC, the user has a "standard viewer" role and view/share access to the relevant story.

entry.title: SAPP SAC model YWD (Year-Week-Day) hierarchy is not selectable
entry.content:
In an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) model, the YWD (Year-Week-Day) hierarchy is not selectable when using a live HANA connection. I select the clock (Create date dimension) in the model and want to create the date dimension. However, the YWD option is not available here.  What can I do?

However, this hierarchy option is displayed in another model, and they are identical.

entry.title: When Datasphere model in blended charts will be supported in Optimized Experience dashboards
entry.content:
We have converted classic stories to optimized experience as of Q2 2026 they will be deprecated. However, most of the widgets of the SAC BI Usage Dashboard are not supported in optimized view. We would like to know:

  1. When SAP Datasphere model in blended charts will be supported?
  2. How to recreate blended tables using the new table build experience? (if possible)
  3. What is the mitigation plan for the Explorers as they won't be available in future?

entry.title: How to check critical parameters of the SAC system: database usage, Logs, Network Component size
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is there a standard SAC dashboard / report, to see all the limits of the critical items like usage of the memory / HANA database, Activity logs size, Network Component size, etc.

How to increase the limits?

Thanks,

SP

entry.title: Send user login data from SuccessFactors to SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to send user login data from SuccessFactors to SAC that stipulates the last time a user logged in on SuccessFactors.

When checking the OData API Data Dictionary, we only find a field "lastLoginFailedDateTime". We cannot find one for the last login time.

Where can we get these data sets via the OData API?

Thanks

entry.title: Passing parameter from one SAC story to another SAC Story
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a Header and Detail data created in 2 separate stories. The customer wants to have a hyperlink to connect to detail story and show the detail content based on the header strory row where the cursor was.

The detail story model has nearly 1 million row, but if I take all the row level column combination the detail ccould be below a few hundereds.  On the initial build detail could not refresh because too many rows. I cannot apply filter to reduce the volume either.

Any suggestions on filter passing between stories.?

Thank you,

Arthur.

entry.title: sac的年龄计算有问题，目前是出生日期当天年龄就+1，和实际不符合，实际是到达生日后的一天年龄在+1
entry.content: sac的年龄计算有问题，例如陈达新 出生日期是2001年1月31日，截止到2026年1月31日，年龄是24岁，不是现在的25岁，如何处理？

entry.title: Variance Option Missing in Optimized Story Bar Chart
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to display a variance on sales current vs previous period per Month in a bar chart within an Optimized Experience story, but the variance option is currently not available in the chart settings. Could you please advise whether this feature is supported and how it can be enabled?

Thank you in advance.

Kind regards,

Asya

entry.title: SAC Integration to Google sheet for Planning
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We have requirement to do the planning and forecasting in SAC from Google sheet.  Kindly let me know if there is solution. I know we can do this using of Excel Add-on from Excel, but I need the same solution from Google sheet. Please let us know if there is solution, and share the documentation

Thank you.

entry.title: How to get the internal UUID of a story calculated measure in SAC to be used in addMeasure(<UUID>) ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working in SAP Analytics Cloud with a chart based on a Datasphere live model.

I need to add a calculated measure (running totals) dynamically in an onSelect script. The scripting works when I use a UUID/GUID for some existing calculated measures that were created before by another developer.

Example:

Chart_1.addMeasure("92686182-6103-4765-8764-242384601111");

This works for some old calculated measures, so SAC is clearly accepting an internal UUID for those measures.

My problem is that for a new calculated measure I created, I cannot find the UUID.

What I tried:

  • Chart_1.getDataSource().getMeasures()
  • logging the full data source measures
  • trying the measure description
  • trying the user-defined measure ID

But getMeasures() only returns the backend/model measures from Datasphere, and my calculated measure is not included there.

So my questions are:

  1. In SAC scripting, how can I retrieve the internal UUID of a calculated measure created in the story?
  2. Is there any supported API to access story calculated measures for a chart based on a Datasphere live model?

Any guidance or best practice would be appreciated.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAC Modeler – Split alphanumeric IDs into “letters” and “digits” when the prefix length varies
entry.content:
Context

  • SAP Analytics Cloud, New Model (data imported from Excel), working in Modeler > Transform Data / calculated columns.

Data/Goal

  • One column contains IDs like: ABC12345, WXYZ1234, etc.
  • I need two new columns:
    • Letters: the leading alphabetic characters
    • Numbers: the trailing digits
  • Expected examples: ABC12345 → ABC | 12345; WXYZ1234 → WXYZ | 1234.
  • The count of letters varies (3–4 or more), and there is no delimiter.

What I tried

  • Split transform: can’t find a delimiter that separates letters from digits.
  • SUBSTR/LENGTH: works only when the length is constant; with variable lengths it produces wrong results (e.g., returns 'Z1234' for WXYZ1234). 

 Questions

  1. What is the recommended way in SAC Modeler to split these IDs into “letters” and “digits” when the prefix length varies?

entry.title: Is it possible to combine a filter with the exportPDF scripts in SAC?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m using exportPDF scripting behind a button to automatically export story PDFs in SAC. Since I have around 100 PDFs to export, and each one takes about 2–3 minutes, the entire process takes roughly four hours to complete.

One limitation is that if the export process gets interrupted, restarting it will always begin from the very first file again, rather than resuming from where it stopped.

Given this constraint, I’m wondering if it is possible to add a “filter” so that users can choose whether to export all PDFs or only export PDFs for a specific company code.

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAP SAC Data Action to update dimension member by reading other document
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement  in planning model. Copy Customer ID from "RV - Accounting document for billing" document to "SA (G/L Account)" document. User prompt is on both document numbers and period. Can anyone provide me your insights to achieve this ? I tried with data action, but somehow I couldn't achieve it.  

Thanks,

entry.title: Column and Line Charts with trellis
entry.content:
Hi I have built a Column and Line Charts where I want to see for each workcenter how much it produces, and its average.

As you can see the reference line is the global average (93), but I want that each workcenter has its own average (I've highlated in yellow).

How can I do this?

It's the same if I put the Qty in the reference line:

entry.title: User-Export in SAC and Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Community!

Is it possible for SAC and Datasphere users to export an overview to which teams the users are assigned to? So far I have only seen the export function for the user–role assignment. From the exported overview, it is not clear which teams these users are assigned to. 

Thanks and best wishes!

entry.title: SAC Report is unable to display on webpage but able to export all data
entry.content:
We have SAC report called GST Report, initially it was built using SAP BW as backend but since we're moving to SAP Datasphere and now since the report is pointing to datasphere the report has 1 tab which does not display report data and throws error: 

 

Server ErrorThe data cannot be displayed: the query process was stopped before it finished because it returned too many records. Please try filtering your data

entry.title: Apply date granularity in SAC story using a filter or input control
entry.content:
Hi experts!!

Is there a way to apply a input control or filter to define date granularity as month, year or quarter, month, year?
